layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID: Dense, strict grid hierarchy. Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Widgets are col-span-1 or col-span-2. Use pure HTML/Tailwind classes for grid layout. No massive empty spaces.

components.header: Solid white background with 1px bottom border (border-border). Must include logo, primary nav links (Dashboard, Tickets, Reports, Admin), and user avatar.
components.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-0.5), subtle shadow (shadow-sm), border color darkens.
components.buttons: Action Blue background for primary with white text. Minimalist, geometric (rounded-sm or rounded-md). Focus states must have high contrast rings.
components.tables: High density. 1px borders separating rows. Row hover state with very light gray (hover:bg-gray-50).
components.forms: Inputs with 1px borders, white background. Focus states must use Action Blue ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0047AB] focus:border-transparent).
components.status_badges: High contrast minimal style. Red text/border for 'Open/Urgent', Green for 'Closed', Gray for 'Pending'. Use thin borders (border border-current px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold).

animations.page_load: staggered fade-in for grid items (opacity-0 to opacity-100)

login_background.description: Minimalist office architecture for login screen background.

company_logo_placeholder.description: Abstract black and white modern logo placeholder.

user_avatar.description: Professional user avatar for the header.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using the 'Control Room' grid layout for optimal data density.
Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for all iconography.
Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactive elements (Select, Dialog, Form, Table).
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for automated testing.
Implement the UI using .js (JSX) files, NOT .tsx.
For the 'Search customer by mobile number' feature: design an inline search input with a clear loading state that displays the customer's name on confirmation.
Include a 'WhatsApp Message Sent' toast notification mechanism when a ticket is closed.
Ensure hover states and focus rings are distinct and accessible across all forms and tables.
Maintain strict typography scaling: Headings use Chivo, body uses IBM Plex Sans.
